content: I would propose "Hack Meetup: Building a Better Porchfest" to honor the source of the inspiration
"PorchREST" would be a great name if you built out an API. Just sayin haha

The Bluesky folks in Boston are putting Porchfest on the "Atmosphere" (analogous to the Fediverse):

https://blacksky.community/profile/did:plc:pqerwmnouevyltxyoayhholf/post/3mlge5zvv2k2a
They have events and maps built into the system I guess. Atmosphere is pretty nice but of course it's somewhat more centralized. They're in an interesting middle zone.

It's so much easier to sell a company on making an integration. Bluesky has a bunch of users. Things are automatically compatible. It's pretty nice. It bothers me because I prefer the Fediverse :sweat_smile:.

There's also this unofficial Somerville Porchfest map:

https://www.porchfest.io/
